Title: CRM - Organizations
Description: One row per company, partner, client, prospect, school, municipality, nonprofit, or internal operating entity.
Columns: RecordKey; SourceSystem; Owner; Status; NextAction; LastReviewed; CentralOSLink; GraphNodeId; FutureCrmId; Notes; OrganizationType; RelationshipStatus; PrimaryDomain; Website; PrimaryOwner; CurrentEngagementKey
Views: Active Organizations; Prospects / Signals; Partners / Clients; Archived

Title: CRM - Contacts
Description: One row per person or stakeholder, linked by portable keys to organization and engagement records.
Columns: RecordKey; SourceSystem; Owner; Status; NextAction; LastReviewed; CentralOSLink; GraphNodeId; FutureCrmId; Notes; ContactEmail; OrganizationKey; RoleTitle; RelationshipRole; CommunicationStatus; PreferredChannel
Views: Active Contacts; Waiting on Adam; By Organization; Do Not Contact / Archived

Title: CRM - Engagements
Description: Central relationship/work record; one row per meaningful engagement, offer path, onboarding, delivery, support, or offramp.
Columns: RecordKey; SourceSystem; Owner; Status; NextAction; LastReviewed; CentralOSLink; GraphNodeId; FutureCrmId; Notes; OrganizationKey; PrimaryContactKey; EntryPackage; CurrentPackage; TargetPackage; PlannedOfframpPackage; EngagementStage; ExecutionStage; SuccessCriteria; OffboardingRequirements; RiskLevel
Views: Active Engagements; New / Discovery; Waiting on Adam; At Risk; Offboarding / Alumni

Title: CRM - Stakeholder Map
Description: Connects contacts to engagements with role, influence, engagement level, and decision responsibility.
Columns: RecordKey; SourceSystem; Owner; Status; NextAction; LastReviewed; CentralOSLink; GraphNodeId; FutureCrmId; Notes; EngagementKey; ContactKey; StakeholderRole; InfluenceLevel; EngagementLevel; DecisionRole
Views: Active Stakeholders; Decision Makers; Needs Attention

Title: CRM - Touchpoints
Description: Calls, emails, meetings, notes, follow-ups, and relationship history.
Columns: RecordKey; SourceSystem; Owner; Status; NextAction; LastReviewed; CentralOSLink; GraphNodeId; FutureCrmId; Notes; EngagementKey; ContactKey; TouchpointDate; Channel; Direction; Summary; FollowUpRequired; FollowUpDueDate; RelatedLink
Views: Recent Touchpoints; Follow Up Required; By Engagement

Title: CRM - Lifecycle Checklist
Description: Onboarding, delivery, offboarding, handoff, and closeout checklist items.
Columns: RecordKey; SourceSystem; Owner; Status; NextAction; LastReviewed; CentralOSLink; GraphNodeId; FutureCrmId; Notes; EngagementKey; ChecklistPhase; ChecklistItem; DueDate; ChecklistStatus; EvidenceLink; BlocksOfframp
Views: Open Checklist; Onboarding Checklist; Offboarding Checklist; Blocked / Waiting; Completed
